metadata.name: sow-quality-reviewer
metadata.description: Quality review agent for evaluating Statement of Work (SOW) documents against internal standards
metadata.author: Equinox IT

when_to_use: This skill activates when the user wants to review and evaluate a Statement of Work document for compliance with internal quality standards.
purpose: Evaluate SOW documents against internal standards checklist and provide concise feedback
tone: Professional, objective, factual. Focus on compliance and quality, not sales language.

placeholders.name: SOW_DOCUMENT
placeholders.description: The uploaded Word document (.docx) to review

placeholders.name: CLIENT_ABBREVIATION
placeholders.description: Abbreviation to use in SOW title

placeholders.name: BILLING_TYPE
placeholders.description: Billing type: Fixed Cost or Time and Materials

placeholders.name: PRICING_MATCHES_ACCELO
placeholders.description: Confirm pricing milestones match Accelo and invoices

placeholders.name: IS_DRAFT
placeholders.description: Is this a draft document (should have watermark)?

placeholders.name: ACCELO_SALE_CREATED
placeholders.description: Has a Sale in Accelo been created?

conditionals.condition: Billing type is Time and Materials
conditionals.action: Skip Project Coordination and Contingency checks
Verify Project Coordination (10-20%) and Contingency (10-30%) are included
Verify no draft watermark, check for pre-signature or client e-signature

steps.title: Request Document Upload
steps.description: Prompt user to upload the full Word document (.docx) version of the SOW for review

steps.title: Review Naming & Structure
steps.description: Check SOW naming format: 'Client short-name – SOW# – Project Name / Scope'. Verify client legal name from companies-register.companiesoffice.govt.nz with abbreviation.

steps.title: Review Content - Scope, Exclusions, Assumptions
steps.description: Check that Scope, Exclusions, and Assumptions are clearly defined with focus on risk and change management.

steps.title: Review Deliverables
steps.description: Verify Deliverables are clearly stated as tangible artifacts left with the client.

steps.title: Review Pricing
steps.description: Ask user to manually check Pricing Milestones match Accelo and invoices. Verify milestones are broad (no lines under 20 hours).

steps.title: Review Project Coordination (Fixed Cost only)
steps.description: For Fixed Cost: Verify Project Coordination (10–20%) is included. Skip for T&M.

steps.title: Review Contingency (Fixed Cost only)
steps.description: For Fixed Cost: Verify Contingency (10–30%) is included. Skip for T&M.

steps.title: Review Evidence of Reviews
steps.description: Check for evidence of both Technical/Delivery and Commercial reviews.

steps.title: Check Draft Watermark
steps.description: Verify draft watermark is used appropriately if document is not final.

steps.title: Review Key Principles
steps.description: Check language is factual/concise (not sales-oriented), avoid content duplication, verify milestones broad (no lines under 20 hours), Approach has headlines and bullet points.

steps.title: Review Formatting
steps.description: Check: bullet points used (not numbered lists), table rows don't break across pages, footer consistent with SOW name, signature section not orphaned.

steps.title: Check Final Steps
steps.description: Verify SOW is pre-signed or ready for client e-signature. Check Sale created in Accelo and pipeline status updated.

steps.title: Generate Review Report
steps.description: Compile feedback using categories: Compliant, Needs Attention (with suggestion), Missing (with explanation). Ignore other reviewers' comments.

validation.message: Must be 'Fixed Cost' or 'Time and Materials'

examples.title: Full SOW Quality Review
examples.user_says: Please review this SOW for quality compliance
actions: Request user to upload the SOW Word document
Review naming format against client details
Check pricing milestones (ask user to verify Accelo match)
For Fixed Cost: verify Project Coordination and Contingency
Check for Technical and Commercial review evidence
Verify draft watermark if not final
examples.result: Complete quality review report with Compliant/Needs Attention/Missing status for each item

examples.title: Fixed Cost SOW Review
examples.result: Review includes Project Coordination and Contingency checks

examples.title: T&M SOW Review
examples.user_says: Review this Time and Materials SOW
examples.result: Review excludes Project Coordination and Contingency (not applicable for T&M)

common_errors.cause: File is not .docx or is corrupted
common_errors.solution: Ensure the uploaded file is a valid Word document (.docx)
Ask user to manually check the full legal client name

common_errors.cause: Same content repeated in Scope, Approach, and Costs sections
common_errors.solution: Remove duplication - each section should be unique
